name: Sour Dough Beef Dip
recipeIngredient: 1 8-inch round loaf of sour dough bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the ingredients well except for the bread.
2. Slice the top off the bread round and carefully hollow out the center, ensuring there are no weak places in the bread shell.
3. Fill the bread shell with the chipped beef mixture.
4. Put the top back on and wrap in foil.
5. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 1.5 hours.
6. Use soft bread from the interior of the loaf to dip into the hot mixture.
7. The bread can also be toasted.
8. Crackers can also be used to dip up the mixture.
9. Serves 12. Randy Rigg
